sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n28076" key="doriste/fanos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δορι-στέφᾰνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n28076.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">crowned for bravery,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Σπάρτα</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">596</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
